open_text: The booking experience was seamless and I loved the new interface. Very intuitive!
Check-in kiosk was broken and staff were unhelpful. Terrible experience overall.
Pretty good overall but the app crashed twice during my session.
Absolutely fantastic service. The staff went above and beyond to help me.
Lost my luggage and nobody could tell me where it was. Worst experience ever.
Good experience overall. The website was a bit slow but got the job done.
Average experience. Nothing special but nothing terrible either.
Love the loyalty program updates! Redeeming miles has never been easier.
Flight was delayed 4 hours with zero communication. Completely unacceptable.
Smooth boarding process and friendly crew. Will definitely fly again.
The mobile app is outdated and crashes frequently. Needs major improvement.
Easy check-in process online. Saved me a lot of time at the airport.
Okay experience. The seat was uncomfortable on a long haul flight.
Perfect journey from start to finish. Highly recommend!
Rude staff at the gate and my upgrade request was completely ignored.
Generally satisfied. The new seat selection tool on the website is great.
The entertainment system was excellent and the food was surprisingly good.
Confusing website layout made it hard to find my booking. Very frustrating.
Quick and easy baggage claim process. Impressed with the efficiency.
Average flight. On time but nothing outstanding about the experience.
Customer support resolved my issue instantly. Great service!
Booking system crashed and I was double charged. Still waiting for refund.
Comfortable flight and timely departure. Happy with the overall experience.
The new app update is amazing. So much faster and easier to use now.
Long wait times at check-in. The process needs to be streamlined.
Pleasant experience. Staff were friendly and helpful throughout.
The loyalty program rewards are not very competitive compared to others.
Outstanding experience from booking to landing. Exceeded all expectations!
Seat was broken and reclined into my lap the entire flight. Horrible.
Very satisfied with the overall journey. Minor delay but well communicated.
Good service. The boarding was organized and efficient.
App keeps logging me out and losing my saved preferences. Very annoying.
Exceptional customer service. They truly care about passenger experience.
Decent flight. Food could be better but overall an okay experience.
The lounge access was a great perk. Very comfortable and well stocked.
Absolutely terrible. Flight cancelled with no rebooking assistance offered.
Loved the new digital boarding pass feature. Very convenient.
Website is slow and outdated. Hard to navigate and find basic information.
Good value for money. Comfortable seats and friendly crew.
Satisfactory experience overall. Could improve the in-flight entertainment.
Best airline experience I have had in years. Will be a loyal customer!
Terrible communication about gate changes. Missed my connection as a result.
Smooth and efficient process throughout. Very happy with the service.
Average experience. The check-in queue was very long but staff were polite.
The upgrade experience was seamless and the business class was excellent.
In-flight wifi was extremely slow and kept disconnecting throughout the flight.
Amazing loyalty rewards. Got a free flight upgrade as a surprise. Love it!
Good experience. The staff were helpful and the flight was on time.
Okay overall. The baggage fees are a bit high compared to competitors.
Everything was perfect. Booking, boarding, flight, and baggage. 10 out of 10.
